content:
Future euro banknote design proposals



Our euro banknotes are getting a new look! Designers from all over Europe have reimagined how they may look like, and one of their proposals is to become the next design of the euro banknotes.

Want to have a say on which designs are your favourites?

Share your opinion in our survey!
Browse through the shortlisted designs below


While the ECB provided guidelines for the creation of the designs, the resulting proposals are solely based on the artist's creative rendition. The ECB bears no responsibility for any elements that may or may not be included in the selected design proposals, or that any of the depicted elements will appear in the portrayed way on the final banknotes.


Terms of use

These images depict design proposals for a possible future euro banknote series. It may be used only for information, editorial and news-reporting purposes. Commercial, promotional or merchandising use, alteration, misleading presentation, or any use suggesting ECB or Eurosystem endorsement is not permitted without the ECB’s prior written authorisation.
The image must be identified as a design proposal and the ECB acknowledged as the source.
